stemHtml: ATC: “Are you able to maintain a parallel offset route?”. The ATC controller wants to know if you can...

options.a: Fly at a certain distance parallel to your assigned route.
options.b: Change onto an airway running parallel to your assigned route.
options.c: Overtake a slow-flying aircraft which is following the same track.
options.d: Change course to avoid an aircraft flying on the same track in opposite direction.
